tldr: US and Iran held talks that laid a "very good foundation for a successful final deal," with Iran agreeing to the return of UN nuclear inspectors and the US partially lifting oil sanctions.
Global markets saw gains as a US-Iran peace deal appears to be finalized, potentially easing geopolitical tensions and oil price concerns.
Markets reached record highs as a preliminary U.S.-Iran deal was announced, potentially reopening the Strait of Hormuz and lowering oil prices.
